title: Moonlet
summary: A React Native cryptocurrency wallet supporting Solana, Ethereum, Zilliqa, and Near. Delivered iOS, Android, and a Chrome Extension from a single codebase.

title: Tiexo
summary: Full-stack NFT marketplace and data aggregator. Owned blockchain parsing, transaction building, REST API, and Next.js front end from zero to production.

title: Soundmix
summary: Mobile-first live streaming platform for DJs. Led the full team — product spec, development, recruitment, CI/CD, and delivery.

title: StatsOS
summary: Side project in beta. Processes Whoop exports and surfaces insights on recovery, sleep, and strain — with AI-generated summaries. Built with React, Expo (web), and LLM integration.

title: DayOS
summary: Side project in beta. A personal productivity system built around daily output — task management, journaling, and planning with AI assistance at its core. React + Expo (web).
